description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 3, 2024 at 6:27PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a van on Kansas Street at 23rd Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling north on Kansas Street and came to a stop at the stop sign at the intersection with 23rd Street when the front 
of the van traveling behind the Waymo AV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode.
Print
Clear Form
